introSection: Farmyard Flyer is a steel kiddie roller coaster at Paultons Park in Romsey, Hampshire, England, UK. It is located within the Tornado Springs themed area of Paultons Park, and opened in 2022.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Farmyard Flyer was officially confirmed by Paultons Park in a promotional video for the initial phase two of Tornado Springs in April 2021.

In the summer of 2021, pieces of track started to arrive at the park.

The ride opened on 1 April 2022.

fullText:
Farmyard Flyer is a steel kiddie roller coaster at Paultons Park in Romsey, Hampshire, England, UK. It is located within the Tornado Springs themed area of Paultons Park, and opened in 2022.

Farmyard Flyer was officially confirmed by Paultons Park in a promotional video for the initial phase two of Tornado Springs in April 2021.

In the summer of 2021, pieces of track started to arrive at the park.

The ride opened on 1 April 2022.
